at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo

Class AlignmentList.Alignment

  • java.lang.Object
      • at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.AlignmentList.Alignment
  • Enclosing class:
    AlignmentList

    public class AlignmentList.Alignment
extends
    An AlignmentList.Alignment is a list of AlignmentList.Alignment.AlignmentAtoms.
    Author:
    Alexander Baumgartner

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AlignmentList.Alignment.AlignmentAtom
      An AlignmentList.Alignment.AlignmentAtom consists of an TermAtom and two indexes for the positions of the atom inside the two hedges of an Equation.
